page.heading: Everything You Wanted to Know About Your Roof

items.question: How long does a full roof replacement take?
items.answer: Most residential replacements are complete in 1–2 days. Larger or complex roofs may take 3–4 days. We'll give you a precise timeline at the quote stage.

items.question: Do you offer warranties on your work?
items.answer: Yes. All workmanship is covered by our 10-year guarantee. Materials carry manufacturer warranties that vary by product — we'll explain these during your quote.

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Absolutely. We hold State License #LIC-XXXXXXX and carry full general liability and workers' compensation insurance. Certificates available on request.

items.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency?
items.answer: We aim to be on-site within 45 minutes for emergency calls in our primary service area. Call (555) 800-ROOF any time — 24/7.

items.question: What roofing materials do you work with?
items.answer: We install and repair all common roofing materials: asphalt shingles, architectural shingles, metal roofing, flat/TPO, and cedar shake. We'll recommend the best option for your home and budget.

items.question: Do I need to be home during the work?
items.answer: You don't need to be present for most jobs, though we recommend it for the initial walkthrough and final inspection. We'll keep you updated throughout.

items.question: How do I know if I need a repair or a full replacement?
items.answer: A trained eye can tell the difference quickly. We offer a free inspection and give you an honest assessment — we'll never recommend a full replacement if a repair will do the job.

items.question: Do you offer financing?
items.answer: Yes. We partner with several financing providers for larger jobs. Ask about our options when you request a quote.
